title: Proverbs Quiz
subtitle: Match the situation to the idiomatic expression

slides.scenario: He looks mean, but he's actually very kind.
options: Don't judge a book by its cover

slides.scenario: To be a pro, you must train every single day.
I lost my wallet, but found a better job today!
options: Every cloud has a silver lining
slides.meaning: There is something good in every bad situation.

slides.scenario: Stop talking about it and just do the work.
options: Two heads are better than one
slides.meaning: What you do matters more than what you say.

slides.scenario: We need to shop at 5:00 AM for the best deals.
options: The early bird catches the worm
Rome wasn't built in a day

slides.scenario: Don't spend that prize money until you have it.
options: Don't count your chickens before they hatch
All that glitters is not gold

slides.scenario: Working out is hard, but you'll feel great later.
options: Out of sight, out of mind
Half a loaf is better than none

slides.scenario: I had no tools, so I invented a way to open it.
options: Necessity is the mother of invention

slides.scenario: Vacation was fun, but I missed my own bed.
options: Birds of a feather flock together

slides.scenario: Let's brainstorm together to find a solution.
options: Two heads are better than one
Too many cooks spoil the broth

slides.scenario: He found $100 and lost it the very next hour.
slides.meaning: Quickly gained things are easily lost.

slides.scenario: Your parents pay for school; don't be rude to them.
options: Don't bite the hand that feeds you
slides.meaning: Don't harm someone who helps you.

slides.scenario: This house took two years to renovate.
options: Rome wasn't built in a day
Make hay while the sun shines

slides.scenario: He is very quiet, but he is a secret genius.
options: All that glitters is not gold
Out of sight, out of mind
slides.meaning: Quiet people often have deep thoughts.

slides.scenario: I finally learned to drive at the age of sixty!
slides.meaning: Doing something late is better than not doing it.

slides.scenario: You tell me to be tidy, but your room is a mess!
That 'gold' watch turned out to be fake.
options: All that glitters is not gold
Two heads are better than one

slides.scenario: All the musicians in town hang out at that cafe.
options: Birds of a feather flock together

slides.scenario: Think carefully before you quit your job.
options: Make hay while the sun shines
Necessity is the mother of invention

slides.scenario: I wanted a full bonus, but I'll take the 20%.
options: Half a loaf is better than none

slides.scenario: The sun is out; let's go finish the gardening now.
options: Make hay while the sun shines
Rome wasn't built in a day
The early bird catches the worm
slides.meaning: Use opportunities at the right time.

slides.scenario: Since he moved away, I've forgotten his name.
options: Out of sight, out of mind
slides.meaning: People forget what they don't see.

slides.scenario: She took a big risk and it paid off beautifully.
options: Slow and steady wins the race

slides.scenario: You're getting this for free, so don't complain.
options: Don't judge a book by its cover

slides.scenario: Sweep the floor; a clean home is a happy home.
She's jealous of them, but they aren't happy.
options: The grass is always greener on the other side
All that glitters is not gold

slides.scenario: This vintage car runs better than a brand new one.
options: Rome wasn't built in a day

slides.scenario: Don't rush the project; do it right the first time.
options: Slow and steady wins the race
The early bird catches the worm

slides.scenario: If you want to learn this, you will find the time.
options: Where there is a will, there is a way
Two heads are better than one

slides.scenario: There are too many people trying to lead this.
options: Too many cooks spoil the broth
Birds of a feather flock together
slides.meaning: Too many people can ruin a task.

slides.scenario: We are losing profit every minute we waste.
options: Necessity is the mother of invention
Every cloud has a silver lining

slides.scenario: Wash your hands; it's a very important habit.
He stayed to help me when I had no money.
options: A friend in need is a friend indeed
Two heads are better than one
slides.meaning: True friends help in difficult times.

slides.scenario: The train was late, but I'm glad I made it.
options: Rome wasn't built in a day
slides.meaning: Doing something late is better than not doing it.

slides.scenario: The hotel is nice, but I want my own house.
options: All that glitters is not gold
